TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Patikoen ko sera no yincuminco == I 1988 miheca 8 folad 25 romi'ad, "Taywan yincuminco patikoen ko sera no mako onto no katatekoan" matakos ko rafasay 2000 kasafinacadan no yincumin, milongoc to sakacisera a salongoc, itira i lalan no Taypi mirakat, oya a demak o ikoray to nika tedal to no pi'emec, o sata'akay syakay onto no yincumin u Taywan. Taywan Yincuminco salongoc yofayof ​Kahecalay katalawan a to'ek mihecaan, i 1950 miheca wata ko pipenec no mikowanay a KMT to onto no yincumin, ci Uong'e Yatauyungana (Kao Yiseng), Yapasuyongʉ Yulunana (Tang Shouren), Losing Watan (Lin Ruichang) a kakeridan no yincumin, mapakokot no misolapay imeng to tatiihay tamdaw saan a patayen. ​​Tangasa i 1980 mihecaan, itiya to nano nipilongoc finawlan no Taywan ci pakoniraay nikalongan salongoc, malengat to ko onto no syakay, saka i mapalihaw ko onto i finawlan no yincuminco. ​​​1984 miheca, cinganganay a maradiway no yincumin ato ontoay ci Parangalan (Hu Defu), Icyang Parod, Tulbus Tamapima a tamdaw, palowad patireng to "Taywan Yincuminco salongoc yofayof", oya ci Parangalan (Hu Defu) ko sarakatay a kakeridan itiya. ​​​​Ikor patireng ko Yincienhuy to casi, kinapinapina a palowad to syakay onto, salongoc piteleng to "mangahay kawasan Wu fong", miliyang to paoning notilifi mikiki palatiih to yincumin. I 1987 miheca, Yincienhuy mihapiw to "Niketonan salongoc no Yincuminco i Taywan", pasadak to halo sapikapot mikihatiya to sician salongoc, sera salongoc, pihamon no niyah, patikoen to kacingangan no finacadan, patodong to sowal no ina ato sapirocok to ponka a nilongocan ira ko 17 ko tosir. Patikoen ko sera a onto ​I 1988 miheca, to hatiay o yincienhuy matatahic to marariday saki niyaro' no yincumin a Taywan Kristo ciwlo kiwkay, kasasolsol to kasacefang ato kiwkay no yincumin, misakapot to "Taywan yincuminco patikoen ko sera no mako onto no katatekoan", saka toya mihecaan 8 folad 25 romi'ad palowad to "Patikoen ko sera a pirarakat", marafas to 2000 ko tamdaw mapalalay ko pikihatiya, pasi sifo ko pilongoc patikolen ko noto'asan safal no yincuminco. ​​Sakatosa miheca (1989) 9 folad 27 romi'ad, oya sa a katatekoan o "sakaci'orip ko sera", "O ina ko sera" sanay a laha, palowad to "mifariing haca patikoen ko sera" a pirarakat. I 1993 miheca 12 folad 10 romi'ad, o "yincuminco patikoen ko sera no mako onto no katatekoan" palowad to saka tolo pirarakat, kao "miliyang to picalap, milongoc to saka'orip, patikoen ko sera ako" sanay salongoc, o citodongay to sakowan to tataparan ko yincuminco, pasadak to 4 salongoc: ​​​1. Kacingangan to yincumin ko sanpaw. 2. Patodongen to sakacisera salongoc. 3. Patirengen i kacitodong a patekedan demak. 4. Oniyah a yincumin ko mikowanay. ​Kinatoloay to "patikoen ko sera ako" ko pirarakat, malisaot ko 'aloanay kapah no yincumin mirarakat i lalan. I satakaraway midemakay to laloma'an matingkiay a tamdaw no yincumin i Taywan rafas 30 'ofad, salongan ko tamdaw a misa'osi i, "Patikoen ko sera no mako a onto" sanay o naikoran no lalood o samakerihay syakay onto no yincumin. Nao sanpaw pala yincumin ​"Patikoen ko sera no mako a onto" masapinang no mikowanay siikedan, palasapifalic to sician kalomaocan ko salongoc no syakay onto. I 1994 miheca, Mincintang pacomoden sakifalic to sician laocan ko "kacingangan ato niyah pikowan no yincumin". Toya miheca 7 folad 28 romi'ad, saka 3 rekad pifalic to kimpo mahayda, mapatongal ko liyad to cimiepecay a "sanpaw" salofen pala "yincumin" han. I 2005 miheca, matelek no sifo ko "Tatapangan Rikec no Yincuminco a Finacadan", o pahecian no yincumin syakay onto i Taywan a pirekec. ​​I 2016 miheca 8 folad 1 romi'ad o congtong ci Cai Yinwen misetek o romi'ad no yincuminco, midayhiw to sifo mili'ay to yincuminco, mihayda "kacowat rayray i, ikoray tayni a finawlan, micefisay to iraay no itiniay to a finawlan." Miketon ci Cai Yinwen congtong, o raranikayen micikeroh ko sakisalongoc sakadama no rikec ko yincuminco a tayal. ​​​I 2017 miheca yinminhuy mihapiw "yincuminco a sera ato liyokan no niyaro' a sera fakeciwen pakayraan", pakayni i yincuminco to'asan sofal sapifakeciw, matayoay to pinapina mihecaan i, maliyaw haca kalaliyangen. Maradiway ci Panai Kusui, Mayaw Biho a ontoay no yincumin masisaot itira i Katakelan halafin ko piliyang. ​​​​Nai 1987 miheca yincienhuy mihapiw to "Taywan niketonan salongoc no Yincuminco" hatiniay i, oya nihapiwen matisil ko 17 toris ko salongoc mala patenokan no harateng to saki syakay onto no yincuminco. Misa'icel to pinapina mihecaan, oya nisalongocan rara sato a malaheci, ira ho ko sasa'icelen. Tangasa anini, padoedo macowat ko syakay onto no yincumin, masararemrarem ko pidotoc ko pihajitiya, mala caayay to ko ka cicango'ot itini i kasasiromaroma a ponka i syakay no Taywan. ​​​​I rayray no romi'ad (8 folad 25 romi'ad) Patikoen ko sera no yincuminco Nipacipatay o Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u o~unto~u no~u katatəko~uan" matako~us ko~u rafasaj **** kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaʦisəra a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, itira i ɾaɾan no~u tajpi mirakat, o~uja a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u iko~uraj to~u nika təɬ~ɮaɾ to~u no~u piʡəməʦ, o~u sataʡakaj sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin o~u~u tajwan. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf *kaħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a to~uʡək miħəʦaan, i **** miħəʦa wata ko~u pipənəʦ no~u miko~uwanaj a kmt to~u o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin, ʦi o~u~uo~uŋʡə jatao~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisəŋ), japaso~u~ujo~uŋ* jo~u~uɾo~u~unana (taŋ sħo~uo~u~urən), ɾo~usiŋ watan (ɾin ro~u~uiʦħaŋ) a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, mapako~uko~ut no~u miso~uɾapaj iməŋ to~u tatiiħaj tamɬ~ɮaw saan a patajən. **taŋasa i **** miħəʦaan, itija to~u nano~u nipiɾo~uŋo~uʦ finawɾan no~u tajwan ʦi pako~uniraaj nikaɾo~uŋan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, maɾəŋat to~u ko~u o~unto~u no~u sjakaj, saka i mapaɾiħaw ko~u o~unto~u i finawɾan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. ******* miħəʦa, ʦiŋaŋanaj a maraɬ~ɮiwaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u o~unto~uaj ʦi paraŋaɾan (ħo~u~u ɬ~ɮəfo~u~u), iʦjaŋ paro~uɬ~ɮ, to~u~uɾb~b~vo~u~us tamapima a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ patirəŋ to~u "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf", o~uja ʦi paraŋaɾan (ħo~u~u ɬ~ɮəfo~u~u) ko~u sarakataj a kakəriɬ~ɮan itija. ****iko~ur patirəŋ ko~u jinʦiənħo~u~uj to~u ʦasi, kinapinapina a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u sjakaj o~unto~u, saɾo~uŋo~uʦ pitəɾəŋ to~u "maŋaħaj kawasan wo~u~u fo~uŋ", miɾijaŋ to~u pao~uniŋ no~utiɾifi mikiki paɾatiiħ to~u jinʦo~u~umin. i **** miħəʦa, jinʦiənħo~u~uj miħapiw to~u "nikəto~unan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan", pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ħaɾo~u sapikapo~ut mikiħatija to~u siʦian saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, səra saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, piħamo~un no~u nijaħ, patiko~uən to~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina ato~u sapiro~uʦo~uk to~u po~unka a niɾo~uŋo~uʦan ira ko~u ** ko~u to~usir. patiko~uən ko~u səra a o~unto~u *i **** miħəʦa, to~u ħatiaj o~u jinʦiənħo~u~uj matataħiʦ to~u marariɬ~ɮaj saki nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin a tajwan kristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj, kasaso~uɾso~uɾ to~u kasaʦəfaŋ ato~u kiwkaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin, misakapo~ut to~u "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u o~unto~u no~u katatəko~uan", saka to~uja miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "patiko~uən ko~u səra a pirarakat", marafas to~u **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mapaɾaɾaj ko~u pikiħatija, pasi sifo~u ko~u piɾo~uŋo~uʦ patiko~uɾən ko~u no~uto~uʡasan safaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. **sakato~usa miħəʦa (****) * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja sa a katatəko~uan o~u "sakaʦiʡo~urip ko~u səra", "o~u ina ko~u səra" sanaj a ɾaħa, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "mifariiŋ ħaʦa patiko~uən ko~u səra" a pirarakat. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u o~unto~u no~u katatəko~uan" paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u saka to~uɾo~u pirarakat, kao~u "miɾijaŋ to~u piʦaɾap, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaʡo~urip, patiko~uən ko~u səra ako~u" sanaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u sako~uwan to~u tataparan ko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, pasaɬ~ɮak to~u * saɾo~uŋo~uʦ: ****. kaʦiŋaŋan to~u jinʦo~u~umin ko~u sanpaw. *. pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən to~u sakaʦisəra saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. *. patirəŋən i kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a patəkəɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮəmak. *. o~unijaħ a jinʦo~u~umin ko~u miko~uwanaj. *kinato~uɾo~uaj to~u "patiko~uən ko~u səra ako~u" ko~u pirarakat, maɾisao~ut ko~u ʡaɾo~uanaj kapaħ no~u jinʦo~u~umin mirarakat i ɾaɾan. i satakarawaj miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan matiŋkiaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan rafas ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ, saɾo~uŋan ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a misaʡo~usi i, "patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u a o~unto~u" sanaj o~u naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ o~u samakəriħaj sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin. nao~u sanpaw paɾa jinʦo~u~umin *"patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u a o~unto~u" masapinaŋ no~u miko~uwanaj siikəɬ~ɮan, paɾasapifaɾiʦ to~u siʦian kaɾo~umao~uʦan ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u sjakaj o~unto~u. i **** miħəʦa, minʦintaŋ paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən sakifaɾiʦ to~u siʦian ɾao~uʦan ko~u "kaʦiŋaŋan ato~u nijaħ piko~uwan no~u jinʦo~u~umin". to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ pifaɾiʦ to~u kimpo~u maħajɬ~ɮa, mapato~uŋaɾ ko~u ɾijaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦimiəpəʦaj a "sanpaw" saɾo~ufən paɾa "jinʦo~u~umin" ħan. i **** miħəʦa, matəɾək no~u sifo~u ko~u "tatapaŋan rikəʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a finaʦaɬ~ɮan", o~u paħəʦian no~u jinʦo~u~umin sjakaj o~unto~u i tajwan a pirəkəʦ. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ʦai jinwən misətək o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, miɬ~ɮajħiw to~u sifo~u miɾiʡaj to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, miħajɬ~ɮa "kaʦo~uwat rajraj i, iko~uraj tajni a finawɾan, miʦəfisaj to~u iraaj no~u itiniaj to~u a finawɾan." mikəto~un ʦi ʦai jinwən ʦo~uŋto~uŋ, o~u raranikajən miʦikəro~uħ ko~u sakisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ sakaɬ~ɮama no~u rikəʦ ko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a tajaɾ. ***i **** miħəʦa jinminħo~u~uj miħapiw "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a səra ato~u ɾijo~ukan no~u nijaro~uʡ a səra fakəʦiwən pakajraan", pakajni i jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u to~uʡasan so~ufaɾ sapifakəʦiw, matajo~uaj to~u pinapina miħəʦaan i, maɾijaw ħaʦa kaɾaɾijaŋən. maraɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi panai ko~u~uso~u~ui, majaw b~b~viħo~u a o~unto~uaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin masisao~ut itira i katakəɾan ħaɾafin ko~u piɾijaŋ. ****nai **** miħəʦa jinʦiənħo~u~uj miħapiw to~u "tajwan nikəto~unan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u" ħatiniaj i, o~uja niħapiwən matisiɾ ko~u ** to~uris ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ maɾa patəno~ukan no~u ħaratəŋ to~u saki sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. misaʡiʦəɾ to~u pinapina miħəʦaan, o~uja nisaɾo~uŋo~uʦan rara sato~u a maɾaħəʦi, ira ħo~u ko~u sasaʡiʦəɾən. taŋasa anini, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u maʦo~uwat ko~u sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin, masararəmrarəm ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ko~u piħajitija, maɾa ʦaajaj to~u ko~u ka ʦiʦaŋo~uʡo~ut itini i kasasiro~umaro~uma a po~unka i sjakaj no~u tajwan. ****i rajraj no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ (* fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ) patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u nipaʦipataj o~u sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar
S.FORM: == Patikoen ko sera no yincuminco == I 1988 miheca 8 folad 25 romi'ad, "Taywan yincuminco patikoen ko sera no mako onto no katatekoan" matakos ko rafasay 2000 kasafinacadan no yincumin, milongoc to sakacisera a salongoc, itira i lalan no Taypi mirakat, oya a demak o ikoray to nika tedal to no pi'emec, o sata'akay syakay onto no yincumin u Taywan. Taywan Yincuminco salongoc yofayof ​Kahecalay katalawan a to'ek mihecaan, i 1950 miheca wata ko pipenec no mikowanay a KMT to onto no yincumin, ci Uong'e Yatauyungana (Kao Yiseng), Yapasuyongʉ Yulunana (Tang Shouren), Losing Watan (Lin Ruichang) a kakeridan no yincumin, mapakokot no misolapay imeng to tatiihay tamdaw saan a patayen. ​​Tangasa i 1980 mihecaan, itiya to nano nipilongoc finawlan no Taywan ci pakoniraay nikalongan salongoc, malengat to ko onto no syakay, saka i mapalihaw ko onto i finawlan no yincuminco. ​​​1984 miheca, cinganganay a maradiway no yincumin ato ontoay ci Parangalan (Hu Defu), Icyang Parod, Tulbus Tamapima a tamdaw, palowad patireng to "Taywan Yincuminco salongoc yofayof", oya ci Parangalan (Hu Defu) ko sarakatay a kakeridan itiya. ​​​​Ikor patireng ko Yincienhuy to casi, kinapinapina a palowad to syakay onto, salongoc piteleng to "mangahay kawasan Wu fong", miliyang to paoning notilifi mikiki palatiih to yincumin. I 1987 miheca, Yincienhuy mihapiw to "Niketonan salongoc no Yincuminco i Taywan", pasadak to halo sapikapot mikihatiya to sician salongoc, sera salongoc, pihamon no niyah, patikoen to kacingangan no finacadan, patodong to sowal no ina ato sapirocok to ponka a nilongocan ira ko 17 ko tosir. Patikoen ko sera a onto ​I 1988 miheca, to hatiay o yincienhuy matatahic to marariday saki niyaro' no yincumin a Taywan Kristo ciwlo kiwkay, kasasolsol to kasacefang ato kiwkay no yincumin, misakapot to "Taywan yincuminco patikoen ko sera no mako onto no katatekoan", saka toya mihecaan 8 folad 25 romi'ad palowad to "Patikoen ko sera a pirarakat", marafas to 2000 ko tamdaw mapalalay ko pikihatiya, pasi sifo ko pilongoc patikolen ko noto'asan safal no yincuminco. ​​Sakatosa miheca (1989) 9 folad 27 romi'ad, oya sa a katatekoan o "sakaci'orip ko sera", "O ina ko sera" sanay a laha, palowad to "mifariing haca patikoen ko sera" a pirarakat. I 1993 miheca 12 folad 10 romi'ad, o "yincuminco patikoen ko sera no mako onto no katatekoan" palowad to saka tolo pirarakat, kao "miliyang to picalap, milongoc to saka'orip, patikoen ko sera ako" sanay salongoc, o citodongay to sakowan to tataparan ko yincuminco, pasadak to 4 salongoc: ​​​1. Kacingangan to yincumin ko sanpaw. 2. Patodongen to sakacisera salongoc. 3. Patirengen i kacitodong a patekedan demak. 4. Oniyah a yincumin ko mikowanay. ​Kinatoloay to "patikoen ko sera ako" ko pirarakat, malisaot ko 'aloanay kapah no yincumin mirarakat i lalan. I satakaraway midemakay to laloma'an matingkiay a tamdaw no yincumin i Taywan rafas 30 'ofad, salongan ko tamdaw a misa'osi i, "Patikoen ko sera no mako a onto" sanay o naikoran no lalood o samakerihay syakay onto no yincumin. Nao sanpaw pala yincumin ​"Patikoen ko sera no mako a onto" masapinang no mikowanay siikedan, palasapifalic to sician kalomaocan ko salongoc no syakay onto. I 1994 miheca, Mincintang pacomoden sakifalic to sician laocan ko "kacingangan ato niyah pikowan no yincumin". Toya miheca 7 folad 28 romi'ad, saka 3 rekad pifalic to kimpo mahayda, mapatongal ko liyad to cimiepecay a "sanpaw" salofen pala "yincumin" han. I 2005 miheca, matelek no sifo ko "Tatapangan Rikec no Yincuminco a Finacadan", o pahecian no yincumin syakay onto i Taywan a pirekec. ​​I 2016 miheca 8 folad 1 romi'ad o congtong ci Cai Yinwen misetek o romi'ad no yincuminco, midayhiw to sifo mili'ay to yincuminco, mihayda "kacowat rayray i, ikoray tayni a finawlan, micefisay to iraay no itiniay to a finawlan." Miketon ci Cai Yinwen congtong, o raranikayen micikeroh ko sakisalongoc sakadama no rikec ko yincuminco a tayal. ​​​I 2017 miheca yinminhuy mihapiw "yincuminco a sera ato liyokan no niyaro' a sera fakeciwen pakayraan", pakayni i yincuminco to'asan sofal sapifakeciw, matayoay to pinapina mihecaan i, maliyaw haca kalaliyangen. Maradiway ci Panai Kusui, Mayaw Biho a ontoay no yincumin masisaot itira i Katakelan halafin ko piliyang. ​​​​Nai 1987 miheca yincienhuy mihapiw to "Taywan niketonan salongoc no Yincuminco" hatiniay i, oya nihapiwen matisil ko 17 toris ko salongoc mala patenokan no harateng to saki syakay onto no yincuminco. Misa'icel to pinapina mihecaan, oya nisalongocan rara sato a malaheci, ira ho ko sasa'icelen. Tangasa anini, padoedo macowat ko syakay onto no yincumin, masararemrarem ko pidotoc ko pihajitiya, mala caayay to ko ka cicango'ot itini i kasasiromaroma a ponka i syakay no Taywan. ​​​​I rayray no romi'ad (8 folad 25 romi'ad) Patikoen ko sera no yincuminco Nipacipatay o Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay Mifalicay ci Masao Nikar
S.PHON: == patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u o~unto~u no~u katatəko~uan" matako~us ko~u rafasaj **** kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaʦisəra a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, itira i ɾaɾan no~u tajpi mirakat, o~uja a ɬ~ɮəmak o~u iko~uraj to~u nika təɬ~ɮaɾ to~u no~u piʡəməʦ, o~u sataʡakaj sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin o~u~u tajwan. tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf *kaħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan a to~uʡək miħəʦaan, i **** miħəʦa wata ko~u pipənəʦ no~u miko~uwanaj a kmt to~u o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin, ʦi o~u~uo~uŋʡə jatao~u~ujo~u~uŋana (kao~u jisəŋ), japaso~u~ujo~uŋ* jo~u~uɾo~u~unana (taŋ sħo~uo~u~urən), ɾo~usiŋ watan (ɾin ro~u~uiʦħaŋ) a kakəriɬ~ɮan no~u jinʦo~u~umin, mapako~uko~ut no~u miso~uɾapaj iməŋ to~u tatiiħaj tamɬ~ɮaw saan a patajən. **taŋasa i **** miħəʦaan, itija to~u nano~u nipiɾo~uŋo~uʦ finawɾan no~u tajwan ʦi pako~uniraaj nikaɾo~uŋan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, maɾəŋat to~u ko~u o~unto~u no~u sjakaj, saka i mapaɾiħaw ko~u o~unto~u i finawɾan no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. ******* miħəʦa, ʦiŋaŋanaj a maraɬ~ɮiwaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin ato~u o~unto~uaj ʦi paraŋaɾan (ħo~u~u ɬ~ɮəfo~u~u), iʦjaŋ paro~uɬ~ɮ, to~u~uɾb~b~vo~u~us tamapima a tamɬ~ɮaw, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ patirəŋ to~u "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ jo~ufajo~uf", o~uja ʦi paraŋaɾan (ħo~u~u ɬ~ɮəfo~u~u) ko~u sarakataj a kakəriɬ~ɮan itija. ****iko~ur patirəŋ ko~u jinʦiənħo~u~uj to~u ʦasi, kinapinapina a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u sjakaj o~unto~u, saɾo~uŋo~uʦ pitəɾəŋ to~u "maŋaħaj kawasan wo~u~u fo~uŋ", miɾijaŋ to~u pao~uniŋ no~utiɾifi mikiki paɾatiiħ to~u jinʦo~u~umin. i **** miħəʦa, jinʦiənħo~u~uj miħapiw to~u "nikəto~unan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u i tajwan", pasaɬ~ɮak to~u ħaɾo~u sapikapo~ut mikiħatija to~u siʦian saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, səra saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, piħamo~un no~u nijaħ, patiko~uən to~u kaʦiŋaŋan no~u finaʦaɬ~ɮan, pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u so~uwaɾ no~u ina ato~u sapiro~uʦo~uk to~u po~unka a niɾo~uŋo~uʦan ira ko~u ** ko~u to~usir. patiko~uən ko~u səra a o~unto~u *i **** miħəʦa, to~u ħatiaj o~u jinʦiənħo~u~uj matataħiʦ to~u marariɬ~ɮaj saki nijaro~uʡ no~u jinʦo~u~umin a tajwan kristo~u ʦiwɾo~u kiwkaj, kasaso~uɾso~uɾ to~u kasaʦəfaŋ ato~u kiwkaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin, misakapo~ut to~u "tajwan jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u o~unto~u no~u katatəko~uan", saka to~uja miħəʦaan * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "patiko~uən ko~u səra a pirarakat", marafas to~u **** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw mapaɾaɾaj ko~u pikiħatija, pasi sifo~u ko~u piɾo~uŋo~uʦ patiko~uɾən ko~u no~uto~uʡasan safaɾ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. **sakato~usa miħəʦa (****) * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~uja sa a katatəko~uan o~u "sakaʦiʡo~urip ko~u səra", "o~u ina ko~u səra" sanaj a ɾaħa, paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u "mifariiŋ ħaʦa patiko~uən ko~u səra" a pirarakat. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u o~unto~u no~u katatəko~uan" paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ to~u saka to~uɾo~u pirarakat, kao~u "miɾijaŋ to~u piʦaɾap, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ to~u sakaʡo~urip, patiko~uən ko~u səra ako~u" sanaj saɾo~uŋo~uʦ, o~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj to~u sako~uwan to~u tataparan ko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, pasaɬ~ɮak to~u * saɾo~uŋo~uʦ: ****. kaʦiŋaŋan to~u jinʦo~u~umin ko~u sanpaw. *. pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋən to~u sakaʦisəra saɾo~uŋo~uʦ. *. patirəŋən i kaʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ a patəkəɬ~ɮan ɬ~ɮəmak. *. o~unijaħ a jinʦo~u~umin ko~u miko~uwanaj. *kinato~uɾo~uaj to~u "patiko~uən ko~u səra ako~u" ko~u pirarakat, maɾisao~ut ko~u ʡaɾo~uanaj kapaħ no~u jinʦo~u~umin mirarakat i ɾaɾan. i satakarawaj miɬ~ɮəmakaj to~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan matiŋkiaj a tamɬ~ɮaw no~u jinʦo~u~umin i tajwan rafas ** ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ, saɾo~uŋan ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw a misaʡo~usi i, "patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u a o~unto~u" sanaj o~u naiko~uran no~u ɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ o~u samakəriħaj sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin. nao~u sanpaw paɾa jinʦo~u~umin *"patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u mako~u a o~unto~u" masapinaŋ no~u miko~uwanaj siikəɬ~ɮan, paɾasapifaɾiʦ to~u siʦian kaɾo~umao~uʦan ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u sjakaj o~unto~u. i **** miħəʦa, minʦintaŋ paʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮən sakifaɾiʦ to~u siʦian ɾao~uʦan ko~u "kaʦiŋaŋan ato~u nijaħ piko~uwan no~u jinʦo~u~umin". to~uja miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, saka * rəkaɬ~ɮ pifaɾiʦ to~u kimpo~u maħajɬ~ɮa, mapato~uŋaɾ ko~u ɾijaɬ~ɮ to~u ʦimiəpəʦaj a "sanpaw" saɾo~ufən paɾa "jinʦo~u~umin" ħan. i **** miħəʦa, matəɾək no~u sifo~u ko~u "tatapaŋan rikəʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a finaʦaɬ~ɮan", o~u paħəʦian no~u jinʦo~u~umin sjakaj o~unto~u i tajwan a pirəkəʦ. **i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ o~u ʦo~uŋto~uŋ ʦi ʦai jinwən misətək o~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, miɬ~ɮajħiw to~u sifo~u miɾiʡaj to~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u, miħajɬ~ɮa "kaʦo~uwat rajraj i, iko~uraj tajni a finawɾan, miʦəfisaj to~u iraaj no~u itiniaj to~u a finawɾan." mikəto~un ʦi ʦai jinwən ʦo~uŋto~uŋ, o~u raranikajən miʦikəro~uħ ko~u sakisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ sakaɬ~ɮama no~u rikəʦ ko~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a tajaɾ. ***i **** miħəʦa jinminħo~u~uj miħapiw "jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u a səra ato~u ɾijo~ukan no~u nijaro~uʡ a səra fakəʦiwən pakajraan", pakajni i jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u to~uʡasan so~ufaɾ sapifakəʦiw, matajo~uaj to~u pinapina miħəʦaan i, maɾijaw ħaʦa kaɾaɾijaŋən. maraɬ~ɮiwaj ʦi panai ko~u~uso~u~ui, majaw b~b~viħo~u a o~unto~uaj no~u jinʦo~u~umin masisao~ut itira i katakəɾan ħaɾafin ko~u piɾijaŋ. ****nai **** miħəʦa jinʦiənħo~u~uj miħapiw to~u "tajwan nikəto~unan saɾo~uŋo~uʦ no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u" ħatiniaj i, o~uja niħapiwən matisiɾ ko~u ** to~uris ko~u saɾo~uŋo~uʦ maɾa patəno~ukan no~u ħaratəŋ to~u saki sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u. misaʡiʦəɾ to~u pinapina miħəʦaan, o~uja nisaɾo~uŋo~uʦan rara sato~u a maɾaħəʦi, ira ħo~u ko~u sasaʡiʦəɾən. taŋasa anini, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u maʦo~uwat ko~u sjakaj o~unto~u no~u jinʦo~u~umin, masararəmrarəm ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ ko~u piħajitija, maɾa ʦaajaj to~u ko~u ka ʦiʦaŋo~uʡo~ut itini i kasasiro~umaro~uma a po~unka i sjakaj no~u tajwan. ****i rajraj no~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ (* fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ) patiko~uən ko~u səra no~u jinʦo~u~uminʦo~u nipaʦipataj o~u sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj mifaɾiʦaj ʦi masao~u nikar
